tr.td: 1 tablet (400 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Inadequate digital access affecting health care

ul.li: Patient will demonstrate understanding of prediabetes and implement recommended lifestyle changes including diet, exercise, and glucose monitoring.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour.
Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient.
Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale.
Maintain nocturnal oxygen saturation above 90% during sleep.

tr.td: Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Home continuous positive airway pressure unit (physical object)
1 tablet (400 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed

text.value: 1 tablet (400 mg) every 6 to 8 hours as needed

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product

display.value: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
influenza, inactivated, split virus or surface antigen

text.value: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product

tr.td: Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product

display.value: Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product

text.value: Hepatitis A virus antigen only vaccine product

tr.td: Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

display.value: Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
tetanus toxoid, combinations with diphtheria toxoid

text.value: Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

tr.td: Inadequate digital access affecting health care

display.value: Inadequate digital access affecting health care

text.value: Inadequate digital access affecting health care

ul.li: Patient will demonstrate understanding of prediabetes and implement recommended lifestyle changes including diet, exercise, and glucose monitoring.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes progression.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour.
Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient.
Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale.
Maintain nocturnal oxygen saturation above 90% during sleep.

text.div: Patient will demonstrate understanding of prediabetes and implement recommended lifestyle changes including diet, exercise, and glucose monitoring.

text.value: Patient will demonstrate understanding of prediabetes and implement recommended lifestyle changes including diet, exercise, and glucose monitoring.

text.div: Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.

text.value: Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 6.5% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.

text.div: Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes progression.

text.value: Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight from baseline to improve glycemic control and reduce risk of diabetes progression.

text.div: Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.

text.value: Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week as part of diabetes self-management.
Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour.

text.div: Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient.

text.value: Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient.

text.div: Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale.

text.value: Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale.

text.div: Maintain nocturnal oxygen saturation above 90% during sleep.

text.value: Maintain nocturnal oxygen saturation above 90% during sleep.

display.value: Oxygen saturation in Arterial blood by Pulse oximetry
